feedback.text: I think that every measure taken in order to preserve not just videogames, but any form of art, is really important. I fully support game preservation and the Stop Killing Games iniciative. It can not be OK for games like Destiny(for example) to just not being available in any way after purchasing it. For me, its similar as if your favourite film just stopped being available anywhere, you just can not watch it again, even if you have a physical version. I politely ask for taking measures against this sad occurrence that just happens, in my opinion, for corporate greed.
